scripts.clean: npm run clean:root && npm run clean:demo && npm run clean:src && npm run clean:dist
scripts.start: npm run build && npm --prefix sample-app/enforce-react-demo run start
scripts.start:android: npm run build && npm --prefix sample-app/enforce-react-demo run android
scripts.start:ios: npm run build && npm --prefix sample-app/enforce-react-demo run ios
scripts.start:web: npm run build && npm --prefix sample-app/enforce-react-demo run web
